name: Kreativ Report Broken Link
description: Find broken internal and external links and export clean maintenance reports.
cardUse: Find broken internal and external links and export clean reports.
metaDescription: Scan internal and external links, detect breakage, and export actionable maintenance reports.

detailItems.title: Internal + external scanning
detailItems.body: Crawls links across your content and highlights broken targets by type, source, and status code.

detailItems.title: Actionable reporting
detailItems.body: Exports clear reports for cleanup sessions so teams can resolve link debt quickly.

detailItems.title: Maintenance-first workflow
detailItems.body: Designed for recurring audits in real WordPress maintenance cycles.
